title: glechoma agrestis
intro: Glechoma agrestis, also known as Wood Mint or Creeping Mint, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Glechoma agrestis include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. The herb can be prepared in various forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to address various health concerns.
